Ancients
Phocas (AD 602-610). AV solidus (22mm, 4.46 gm, 6h). NGC MS 4/5 - 4/5. Constantinople, 5th officina, AD 607-610. D N FOCAS-PЄRP AV, draped, cuirassed bust of Phocas facing, wearing crown surmounted by cross, with globus cruciger in right hand / VICTORIA-AVϚЧ Є, Angel standing facing, grounded staff surmounted by staurogram in right hand, globus cruciger in outstretched left; CONOB in exergue.
